headline: Is It Time To Reassess Akamai Technologies (AKAM) After A 36.9% One Year Rally
summary: If you are wondering whether Akamai Technologies is priced attractively today, the key question is how its current share price compares with a reasonable estimate of its underlying value. The stock last closed at US$110.22, with a 29.5% return year to date and a 36.9% return over the past year, which can change how investors think about both upside potential and risk. Recent coverage has focused on Akamai Technologies as a key player in content delivery and cloud security, with attention on...
